description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs: a nightly build job called build:nightly that runs in the default build stage using the rustlang/rust:nightly image and executes `rustc --version && cargo --version`, `cargo build --all && cargo build --examples`, `cargo test --all --verbose`, `ASAN_OPTIONS=detect_odr_violation=0 RUSTFLAGS="-Z sanitizer=leak" cargo test --all`, and `ASAN_OPTIONS=detect_odr_violation=0 RUSTFLAGS="-Z sanitizer=address" cargo test --all`; a stable build job called build:stable also in the default build stage using the rust:latest image that runs `rustc --version && cargo --version`, `cargo build --all && cargo build --examples`, and `cargo test --all --verbose`; and a pages job called pages using rust:latest that runs `cargo doc` then `mv target/doc/ public/`, publishes the `public/` directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch.
